channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-05 to 2026-07-11
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Sun 2026-07-05: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 1.6 ft @ 7.2 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:15, 17:26. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 11 kt ENE, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (ENE). Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 12 kt NNE, water 68°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (NNE). Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.8 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 8 kt NE, water 68°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.8 ft); period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (NE). Thu 2026-07-09: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.9 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 2 kt SE, water 68°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.9 ft); wind direction off (SE). Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 11:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 9 kt W, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-11: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 9 kt NE, water 70°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NE).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Sun 2026-07-05: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 1.6 ft @ 7.2 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:15, 17:26. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 11 kt ENE, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (ENE).
  • Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 12 kt NNE, water 68°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (NNE).
  • Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.8 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 8 kt NE, water 68°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.8 ft); period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (NE).
  • Thu 2026-07-09: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.9 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 2 kt SE, water 68°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.9 ft); wind direction off (SE).
  • Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 11:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 9 kt W, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-11: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 9 kt NE, water 70°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NE).
